texto: See, I'm going to learn y'all how to fish a jerkbait. This is what a jerkbait looks like and it is meant to imitate a dying baitfish in the water. The first way I like to work these is to cover as much water as possible. Just cast them out and all you're going to do is a straight retrieve like I'm doing right here. Just like a swimming baitfish. Now this is the real way how you're supposed to fish a jerkbait and why it's called a jerkbait. You're going to cast it out there. Like I said, it's meant to imitate a dying baitfish. So every time you jerk the lure, jerkbait is going to flutter in the water and look like a baitfish struggling to stay alive. And bass love that and they're going to eat it instantly when they see it. You're going to keep a little slack in your line. The cadence I like to give when I fish this is 1, pause, 1, 2, pause, 1, 2, 3. That way the baitfish is going to really look like it's dying. A lot of times you'll get hits on the pause where that baitfish starts floating back up and a bass will eat it right there. It's supposed to look like this, 1, 2, 1, 1, 2, get out there and fish.

segmentos.text: See, I'm going to learn y'all how to fish a jerkbait.
This is what a jerkbait looks like and it is meant to imitate a dying baitfish in the water.
The first way I like to work these is to cover as much water as possible.
Just cast them out and all you're going to do is a straight retrieve like I'm doing right here.
Now this is the real way how you're supposed to fish a jerkbait and why it's called a jerkbait.
You're going to cast it out there.
Like I said, it's meant to imitate a dying baitfish.
So every time you jerk the lure, jerkbait is going to flutter in the water and look like a baitfish struggling to stay alive.
And bass love that and they're going to eat it instantly when they see it.
You're going to keep a little slack in your line.
The cadence I like to give when I fish this is 1, pause, 1, 2, pause, 1, 2, 3.
That way the baitfish is going to really look like it's dying.
A lot of times you'll get hits on the pause where that baitfish starts floating back up and a bass will eat it right there.
It's supposed to look like this, 1, 2, 1, 1, 2, get out there and fish.
